LightningComponentBundle.description: Modularized Term Builder rail tile: the term chips for the open negotiation plus an inline Add Term bar. Owns term selection and syncs with the Negotiation Context and Term Workspace tiles over the DLM Term Builder message channel.

property.name: headingLabel
property.label: Heading Label
property.description: Title shown on the rail card.

property.name: allowAddTerms
property.label: Allow Adding Terms
property.description: Show the inline Add Term bar. Turn off for a read-only rail that only selects existing Terms.

property.name: maxAddCount
property.label: Max Terms Per Add
property.description: Upper bound on how many Terms can be added in a single Add Term action.
